testcase.name: test_product_lookup_vitmin

failure.message: AssertionError: No products returned for 'vitmin' assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_branch_transfers.py:130: in test_product_lookup_vitmin assert len(data) > 0, "No products returned for 'vitmin'" E AssertionError: No products returned for 'vitmin' E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_receive_transfer
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_branch_transfers.py:267: in test_receive_transfer assert res.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 400: {"detail":"Insufficient stock for 'ENERTONE' in source branch: have 0, need 2"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_price_memory_updated_after_receive

failure.message: AssertionError: Price memory: expected last_retail=1020, got None assert None == 1020.0 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc0392d54140>('last_branch_retail') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc0392d54140> = {'branch_capital': 920.0, 'category': 'Feeds', 'id': 'c313bfe0-3e81-4f50-a55c-f4418e7ad300', 'last_branch_retail': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_branch_transfers.py:319: in test_price_memory_updated_after_receive assert p.get("last_branch_retail") == 1020.0, f"Price memory: expected last_retail=1020, got {p.get('last_branch_retail')}" E AssertionError: Price memory: expected last_retail=1020, got None E assert None == 1020.0 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc0392d54140>('last_branch_retail') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc0392d54140> = {'branch_capital': 920.0, 'category': 'Feeds', 'id': 'c313bfe0-3e81-4f50-a55c-f4418e7ad300', 'last_branch_retail': None, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_order_status_is_received

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected received, got sent assert 'sent' == 'received'
- received + sent

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_branch_transfers.py:332: in test_order_status_is_received assert data["status"] == "received", f"Expected received, got {data['status']}" E AssertionError: Expected received, got sent E assert 'sent' == 'received' E E - received E + sent

testcase.name: test_cancel_received_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_branch_transfers.py:386: in test_cancel_received_returns_400 assert res.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 200: {"message":"Transfer cancelled"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
